formula: var age=parseFloat(inputs.age_months)||0;var h=parseFloat(inputs.height)||0;var g=inputs.gender||'male';var median=g==='male'?(49.9+2.4*age):(49.1+2.3*age);var sd=3.5;var z=(h-median)/sd;var p=Math.round((1+erf(z/Math.sqrt(2)))/2*100);return{percentile:p};
